[Skip to main content](https://www.wired.com/story/sephora-promo-code/#main-content) Save StorySave this story Save StorySave this story All products featured on WIRED are independently selected by our editors. However, we may receive compensation from retailers and/or from purchases of products through these links. [Learn more.](https://www.wired.com/about/affiliate-link-policy/) If you’ve ever shopped for a beauty product, you’ve probably heard of Sephora. The brand is known for its excellent rewards program, free birthday gifts, free samples, generous return policy, and a giant variety of shades and products for everybody. Splurging on makeup, skincare, and haircare products can be expensive, but a Sephora promo code makes it easier to treat yourself to a big black-and-white striped bag of beauty products. ## How to Use a Sephora Coupon While you don’t need to be a [Beauty Insider](https://www.sephora.com/beauty/profile-beautyinsider) to use every Sephora promo code, it’s definitely worth it if you sign up. You’ll earn points with nearly every purchase, plus you’ll get free shipping and a [free birthday gift](https://www.sephora.com/beauty/birthday-gift) each year (like the heavily sought-after Dior perfume set of years past). There are member-exclusive sales and deals too. Once you’re signed up, you’ll be able to use coupons that are specifically for members, like those available during the Sephora Savings Event that takes place each November. ## Our Top Beauty Picks to Get With Your Sephora Discount Code Sephora sells most of [our favorite hair straighteners](https://www.wired.com/gallery/best-hair-straighteners/), [curling irons](https://www.wired.com/gallery/best-curling-iron/), and [hair dryers](https://www.wired.com/gallery/best-hair-dryers/). I also love [Sephora’s gift sets](https://www.sephora.com/shop/value-sets), which are great for holiday gifts but also fantastic ways to treat yourself to something special. Sephora doesn’t only have great makeup, but beauty tech like PMD Clean Pro [facial cleansing brushes](https://www.sephora.com/product/foreo-luna-mini-3-P454821) or super trendy [LED Light Therapy Devices](https://www.wired.com/story/led-face-masks-and-red-light-therapy/) to level up your beauty regimen. Microcurrent Devices like [NuFace Trinity](https://www.sephora.com/product/nuface-trinity-reg-starter-kit-P504221), Cryotherapy Tools like BeautyBio Cryo [Skin Ice Rollers](https://www.sephora.com/product/cryo-skin-icing-roller-bright-eyes-gels-set-P500755), or exfoliating Tools like [dermaplaners](https://www.sephora.com/product/dermaflash-2-0-facial-exfoliation-peach-fuzz-removal-P429043) are great beauty-tech gift ideas for others or yourself. Sephora has a [wide selection of brands](https://www.sephora.com/brands-list) to choose from that you’ve probably seen on TikTok or Instagram. Some highlights include [Drunk Elephant](https://www.sephora.com/brand/drunk-elephant), [Tatcha](https://www.sephora.com/brand/tatcha), and [Fenty Beauty](https://www.sephora.com/brand/fenty-beauty-rihanna). html:
Skip to main content

All products featured on WIRED are independently selected by our editors. However, we may receive compensation from retailers and/or from purchases of products through these links. Learn more.

If you’ve ever shopped for a beauty product, you’ve probably heard of Sephora. The brand is known for its excellent rewards program, free birthday gifts, free samples, generous return policy, and a giant variety of shades and products for everybody. Splurging on makeup, skincare, and haircare products can be expensive, but a Sephora promo code makes it easier to treat yourself to a big black-and-white striped bag of beauty products.

How to Use a Sephora Coupon

While you don’t need to be a Beauty Insider to use every Sephora promo code, it’s definitely worth it if you sign up. You’ll earn points with nearly every purchase, plus you’ll get free shipping and a free birthday gift each year (like the heavily sought-after Dior perfume set of years past). There are member-exclusive sales and deals too. Once you’re signed up, you’ll be able to use coupons that are specifically for members, like those available during the Sephora Savings Event that takes place each November.

Our Top Beauty Picks to Get With Your Sephora Discount Code

Sephora sells most of our favorite hair straighteners, curling irons, and hair dryers. I also love Sephora’s gift sets, which are great for holiday gifts but also fantastic ways to treat yourself to something special. Sephora doesn’t only have great makeup, but beauty tech like PMD Clean Pro facial cleansing brushes or super trendy LED Light Therapy Devices to level up your beauty regimen. Microcurrent Devices like NuFace Trinity, Cryotherapy Tools like BeautyBio Cryo Skin Ice Rollers, or exfoliating Tools like dermaplaners are great beauty-tech gift ideas for others or yourself. Sephora has a wide selection of brands to choose from that you’ve probably seen on TikTok or Instagram. Some highlights include Drunk Elephant, Tatcha, and Fenty Beauty.
